TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kaluluwan, title = Kaluluwan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kaluluwan} }

S.FORM: Kaluluwan Itiniay i Fengbin Cen no Hualien ko Kaluluwan a niyaro', 125 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 305 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 82% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 249 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 18% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 56 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 55%, śííŚ•áśčČťõÖśóŹ9%, Kebalan 4%, Tayal 2%, Bunun 2%, roma 10%.
S.PHON: ka…ĺo~u~u…ĺo~u~uwan itiniaj i f…ôŇčb~b~vin ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u ka…ĺo~u~u…ĺo~u~uwan a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis **%, ******%, k…ôb~b~va…ĺan *%, taja…ĺ *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma **%.
S.FORM: Kaluluwan Itiniay i Fengbin Cen no Hualien ko Kaluluwan a niyaro', 125 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 305 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 82% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 249 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 18% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 56 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 55%, śííŚ•áśčČťõÖśóŹ9%, Kebalan 4%, Tayal 2%, Bunun 2%, roma 10%.
